doc_content.summary: The stark-skill-analytics skill analyzes Claude Code session history and skill run data to provide a comprehensive view of skill usage patterns, adoption trends, and operational quality metrics. It helps identify which skills are popular, which are failing, and gaps between configured and actual usage.
key_features: Parses ~/.claude/history.jsonl to track skill invocations, sequences, and project-specific usage over time.
Aggregates performance data from ~/.claude/code-review/history/ to compute success rates, timeouts, and durations.
Cross-references usage with CLAUDE.md to highlight unregistered skills or deprecation candidates.
Generates actionable recommendations (Remove, Promote, Fix, Investigate, Combine) based on data trends.
Produces Markdown reports and terminal summaries with options to drill down into a single skill or generate table-only summaries.

alt_text: A visualization of the stark-skill-analytics skill workflow, illustrating the four phases of data collection from Claude session logs, run history aggregation, cross-reference analysis with CLAUDE.md, and final report generation.
